---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report a problem with the documentation or suggest a doc improvement
title: '[Docs]: '
labels: documentation
---

**Which documentation page is affected?**
Please provide the URL(s) or repository path(s) to the affected page(s).

- Page: <https://microsoft.github.io/azure-linux-image-tools/...>
- Repo path: `docs/...`

**What is wrong or missing?**
A clear and concise description of the issue (e.g. incorrect information,
broken link, outdated example, missing section, unclear wording).

**Suggested fix**
If you have a suggestion for how the docs should read, please share it here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or references that would help us improve
the docs.
